action_boundary: May AP pay Meridian Tooling's invoice under its new owner Copperline Industrial?
communication_boundary: Decide only from source-control records. Do not use tone, pressure, plausibility, or availability of a verification step as proof of a defect.

documents.text: Invoice INV-MERIDIAN-035 was issued for Meridian Tooling work and requests payment to Copperline Industrial account ending 7719.
Novation agreement NOV-77 transfers Meridian Tooling obligations to Copperline Industrial and is signed by both entities and procurement.
Vendor-master merge VM-MRG-19 executed on 2026-06-10 and maps Meridian Tooling to Copperline Industrial.
Bank ownership record BANK-MERIDIAN-035 shows account ending 4402 unchanged since 2024 and owned by Copperline Industrial.
Release authority REL-MERIDIAN-035 approves invoice INV-MERIDIAN-035, Copperline Industrial, USD 76200, account ending 4402.
Novated-vendor payment is complete only when novation agreement, vendor-master merge, legal successor identity, bank ownership, bank change status, invoice, and release authority bind before payment.
